articles.title: Stephen Lewis awakened Canadians to the HIV-AIDS pandemic raging in Africa: experts
articles.description: TORONTO — Experts say Stephen Lewis awakened the Canadian public’s consciousness to the HIV-AIDS pandemic raging in Africa, and they credit him with galvanizing the political will to stop standing idle. Lewis, who dedicated his life to advocating for social justice, died on Tuesday at the age of 88.
